page_metadata.biotools__summary: (PS)2 Protein Structure Prediction Server performs automated homology modeling by combining PSI-BLAST, IMPALA, and T-Coffee for template selection and target-template alignment. The final three-dimensional (3D) structure is built using RAMP or MODELLER.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: (PS)2 Protein Structure Prediction Server performs automated homology modeling by combining PSI-BLAST, IMPALA, and T-Coffee for template selection and target-template alignment. The final three-dimensional (3D) structure is built using RAMP or MODELLER.
